meta.title: Aurelia Capital | Institutional-grade private equity visibility
meta.description: Multilingual private equity platform with public site, admin workspace, and interactive client dashboard.

home.title: Institutional visibility for private capital, internal teams, and investors.
home.description: One unified experience to present the firm, explain managed assets, and deliver interactive movement and performance visibility to every client.
home.panelCaption: Reference layer for NAV, auditable movements, and sector exposure.

cards.title: Trust and clarity from the first visit
cards.description: The firm, sectors, and assets are presented with a sober multilingual editorial layer.

cards.title: Robust movement registration
cards.description: Administrators work with controls, auditability, and clear separation between capture and review.

cards.title: Dashboards that stay readable
cards.description: Every investor gets a clear visual narrative of positions, movements, and portfolio evolution.

admin.title: Financial operations with control and traceability.
admin.subtitle: Foundation to register movements, control approvals, and establish an institutional audit layer from day one.
admin.movementDescription: The platform is structured to capture movements by client and asset, keep evidence, and decouple internal operations from the investor portal.

workflow.title: Validated capture
workflow.description: Contributions, distributions, and transfers are registered through typed domain inputs.

workflow.title: Traceability
workflow.description: Every mutation is tied to a user, request, and entity for compliance and operational support.

workflow.title: Secure publication
workflow.description: Client-facing data is served from a separate layer designed for performance and clarity.

portal.title: A clear view of committed capital and portfolio evolution.
portal.subtitle: The investor experience prioritizes legibility, trust, and context without losing operational depth.

metrics.label: Total NAV
metrics.description: Consolidated client value prepared for snapshots and comparisons.

metrics.label: Committed capital
metrics.description: Commitments grouped by vehicle and asset with historical visibility.

metrics.label: Net IRR
metrics.description: Metric ready to connect to real calculations and time series.

timeline.title: Partial distribution
timeline.description: Capital returned from regional infrastructure with a positive liquidity effect.

timeline.title: New commitment approved
timeline.description: Allocation to the energy vehicle with documentation prepared for client access.
